meaning: n.[寤篯鑺遍グ绐楁牸,绐楅グ
examples: Tracery or an ornament with four foils or lobes.
The house we live in has 21 stories with red and yellow tracery outer wall.
The same tracery may look entirely different under light coming from different angles.
Three tiers of arched balconies overlook the generous expanse below, their railings worked in elaborate wrought iron tracery.
